name: memory-storage-monorepo
description: Local hybrid search / RAG memory layer for local LLMs (monorepo)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace memory-storage && npm run build --workspace memory-storage-cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace memory-storage && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run build --workspace memory-storage && npm run check --workspace memory-storage-check
scripts.cli: npm run build --workspace memory-storage && npm run start --workspace memory-storage-cli --
